evals.prompt: Set up a retail interview pipeline with order events flowing through bronze, silver, gold
evals.expected_output: PySpark data gen with spark.range + Faker UDFs for bronze, SQL transforms for silver/gold, TALK/SCALING/DW-BRIDGE comments throughout

assertions.text: Data generation uses PySpark spark.range, not SQL INSERT
Uses DECIMAL for monetary amounts, never DOUBLE
Silver layer uses MERGE with ROW_NUMBER dedup

evals.prompt: Generate 100k media streaming events for an interview demo
evals.expected_output: PySpark data gen with Faker UDFs, ~100k rows, media vertical entities

assertions.text: Registers Faker UDFs for realistic data
Entities are media-specific (streams, episodes, watch events)
